title: Zeroizing on OrchardSpendingKey and SaplingExtendedSpendingKey inner fields is correct; defend against caching suggestion
description: Both spending key types store bytes in Zeroizing and reconstruct key objects per-call. A contributor might suggest caching the reconstructed key for performance. This must be resisted: the performance cost is negligible for infrequent payment operations, and caching would reintroduce a non-zeroized copy of spending key material.
